status.next_allowed_action: Execute WU 4.1: implement four selection modes, structural facts, and action mapping in graph-engine.

new_dependency_whitelist_runtime: chokidar (only if fs.watch recursive proven unreliable; record evidence)
execution_rules.toolchain_devdeps_allowed: typescript/vite/tsx/concurrently and @types/* reusing workbench-pinned versions do NOT count as new dependencies
execution_rules.privacy_check_every_commit: git diff --cached must not contain /Users/ paths; never commit demo-KB generated graph-data/offline HTML

decision_log.evidence: rg over templates/graph-styles/wash/header.html, graph-wash.js, and graph-wash-helpers.js for d3/rough/script-loader terms only matched the graph-data JSON script tag; no d3 or rough runtime usage was found.
decision_log.consequence: Phase 6 can remove d3.min.js and rough.min.js from offline HTML packing if no later dependency appears; marked and DOMPurify remain outside this conclusion.

decision_log.evidence: scripts/init-wiki.sh writes a knowledge-base .gitignore containing only .wiki-tmp/; it creates .wiki-cache.json but does not ignore it.
decision_log.consequence: .wiki-graph-layout.json should align with .wiki-cache.json as a knowledge-base asset and remain not ignored; no init-wiki.sh code change was made in WU 3.3.

2_static_baseline_screenshots.summary: Workbench graph screenshots and legacy offline HTML baseline screenshot are committed for reviewer comparison. Codex does not self-certify final visual equivalence.

3_pinning_persistence.summary: Node pinning, layout persistence, corrupted layout tolerance, refresh restoration, and community-stable drag behavior have evidence. Drag hand-feel remains pending reviewer judgment per manual acceptance rules.

manual_acceptance.item: Static graph visual consistency against legacy offline HTML.
manual_acceptance.reason: Visual consistency is subjective per plan; screenshots are provided for the reviewer instead of Codex self-approval.

manual_acceptance.item: Drag hand-feel and visual smoothness during low-heat node drag.
manual_acceptance.reason: Drag smoothness is subjective per the plan; Codex records evidence and does not self-certify the hand-feel.

phases.name: 活模拟 + 钉扎 + 持久化

work_units.name: d3-force 低温模拟 + 混合布局 + 路径缓存

verification.summary: 95 graph-engine tests passed, including new deterministic simulation state tests for cold-start coordinates, alpha zero sleep, low-heat drag neighbor movement, and far-node freezing.
ESM, IIFE, and declaration outputs built successfully with d3-force included.
server, web, and graph-engine workspace typechecks passed after graph-engine declaration output was regenerated.
Workbench web production build passed; Vite reported only the existing large chunk warning.
Running workbench graph view rendered the demo KB with live simulation coordinates applied to nodes.

verification.command: git diff --cached --check; staged local-path scan; root package type check; scripts/build-graph-data.sh diff check
verification.summary: Staged whitespace check passed, no staged local absolute paths were present, root package.json still has no type field, and scripts/build-graph-data.sh was unchanged.

work_units.notes: Added the whitelisted d3-force runtime dependency plus @types/d3-force for TypeScript, implemented a graph-engine sim module with cold-start low-heat settling and direct-neighbor drag behavior, added render position overrides and stable edge curve caching, and wired the workbench renderer to update existing DOM nodes during live simulation. Initial lowHeatAlphaTarget is 0.15 per plan; drag hand-feel remains a later manual acceptance item.

work_units.name: 钉扎交互 + layout API + 文件持久化

verification.summary: 98 graph-engine tests passed, including PinState pin/unpin/reset coverage and pin matching for graph data without source_path.
3 layout API storage tests passed: read/write roundtrip, missing/damaged file as empty, and unsafe key/invalid coordinate filtering.

verification.command: curl-equivalent Node fetch script: PUT /api/graph/layout -> GET /api/graph/layout -> corrupt file GET
verification.summary: Demo KB layout roundtrip preserved the test pin and a damaged .wiki-graph-layout.json read back as empty pins; the demo KB layout file was restored afterward.

verification.command: Browser plugin dev check on http://localhost:5180 graph view
verification.summary: Opened the workbench graph view, confirmed a pinned Agent Runtime node after loading, clicked reset layout, observed persisted empty pins, clicked undo, observed the pin restored, then reloaded and confirmed the pinned node remained visible.
server, web, and graph-engine workspace typechecks passed; web pretypecheck rebuilt graph-engine declarations first.
ESM, IIFE, and declaration outputs built successfully.
Workbench web production build passed; Vite reported only the existing large chunk warning.

verification.command: git diff --cached --check; staged local-path scan; binary screenshot strings scan; root package type check; scripts/build-graph-data.sh diff check
verification.summary: Staged whitespace check passed, no staged /Users paths were found, the evidence screenshot contained no /Users string, root package.json still has no type field, and scripts/build-graph-data.sh was unchanged.

work_units.notes: Implemented model-coordinate pin persistence keyed by wiki-relative paths, including inferred wiki paths for graph data without source_path; drag end pins nodes, double-click unpins pinned nodes, reset layout clears pins, and the workbench reset notice can undo and restore the previous pins. Added GET/PUT /api/graph/layout backed by KB-local .wiki-graph-layout.json with damaged-file tolerance and safe key filtering. Browser evidence for refresh restoration is stored at docs/plans/stage-4-artifacts/p3-pinning-refresh.png. No new dependency was added in this work unit.

work_units.name: 团块拖动行为 + init gitignore 查证

verification.summary: 99 graph-engine tests passed, including the new community wash test that keeps the wash around clustered members instead of stretching to a far outlier.
server, web, and graph-engine workspace typechecks passed; web pretypecheck rebuilt graph-engine declarations first.
ESM, IIFE, and declaration outputs built successfully.

verification.command: System Chrome dev check on http://localhost:5180 graph view
verification.summary: Dragged Context Window from community agent-runtime near Retrieval in community knowledge-base; the node remained in agent-runtime, drag state cleared, and the demo KB layout file was restored afterward. Evidence stored in p3-community-drag.png/json.

verification.command: sed -n scripts/init-wiki.sh and rg wiki-cache/wiki-graph-layout references
verification.summary: init-wiki.sh writes only .wiki-tmp/ to new KB .gitignore; .wiki-cache.json is created but not ignored, so .wiki-graph-layout.json aligns by remaining not ignored. No script change was made.

verification.command: git diff --cached --check; staged local-path scan; binary screenshot strings scan; root package type check; scripts/build-graph-data.sh diff check
verification.summary: Staged whitespace check passed, no staged /Users paths were found, the evidence screenshot contained no /Users string, root package.json still has no type field, and scripts/build-graph-data.sh was unchanged.

work_units.notes: Community wash now uses the clustered member body when a far outlier is present, so a pinned or dragged-away member does not stretch the wash. The renderer updates wash ellipses during live motion, fades all washes while a node is being dragged, and recalculates after drag end. init-wiki.sh was checked: .wiki-cache.json is not ignored, and .wiki-graph-layout.json should remain likewise not ignored as a user/KB asset. Browser drag evidence is stored under docs/plans/stage-4-artifacts/; hand-feel is recorded for manual review.
